subcodes.first_line: O servants and handmaidens of God! Your services at the Sacred Threshold are clear and manifest as the radiant moon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عباد و اماء الهی خدماتتان باستان مقدس مانند مه تابان واضح و عیان ذلک من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
